title: Morisonia scabrida

At the rank of species, it is classified within the genus Morisonia, which is part of the larger Malvaceae family. The classification of Morisonia scabrida is also reflected in its binomial nomenclature, which is a system used to identify and categorize species. This system is based on the combination of a genus and species name, in this case, Morisonia scabrida.
